name: playwright_ts_practice
description: A project to explore Playwright more with TypeScript

scripts.test:report: npx playwright test && npx playwright show-report
scripts.test:regression:report: npx playwright test --headed --grep="@regression" && npx playwright show-report
scripts.test:codegen:report: npx playwright test --grep="@codegen" && npx playwright show-report
scripts.test:locators:report: npx playwright test --grep="@locators" && npx playwright show-report
scripts.test:assertions:report: npx playwright test --grep="@assertions" && npx playwright show-report
